observations.archetype_gloss: The protagonist who must move forward despite internal and external challenges
observations.summary: Dan embodies the Hero archetype as he learns the lesson of not looking back, symbolizing his integration of past experiences and commitment to forward movement.

evidence.quote: He didn't look back. That lesson, at least, he'd learned from the old stories. Looking back turned you into salt, froze you in place, made you a monument to your own inability to move forward.
